top_signals.title: Ukraine is launching strike-drones from everything – including Black Sea robo-boats
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon is studying the lesson as it shifts focus toward a possible conflict with China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Advance as Jobs Data Dims Prospect of Fed Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: US stocks rose before the bell on Thursday as cooler-than-expected employment data drove traders to dial-back bets that the Federal Reserve could start raising interest rates as soon as this month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Fed's Warsh vows to 'disappoint' anyone who thinks he will tolerate inflation above 2% - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Fed's Warsh vows to 'disappoint' anyone who thinks he will tolerate inflation above 2%  Reuters

top_signals.title: Iran says it is selling oil at 20% premium as end of U.S. blockade sees 40 million barrels exported - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Iran says it is selling oil at 20% premium as end of U.S. blockade sees 40 million barrels exported  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Adds Fewer Jobs Than Expected in June, Unemployment Rate Falls
top_signals.summary: US hiring slowed sharply in June as nonfarm payrolls increased 57,000 last month after downward revisions to the prior two months, according to Bureau of Labor Statistics data out Thursday. Michael McKee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU Bows to Tech Lobby, Drops Ten-Year Renewables Rule for Data Centers
top_signals.summary: The European Union has given in to pressure from Big Tech to water down its strict low-carbon energy requirements in order to pursue its AI agenda as the U.S. and China pull far ahead and the EU plays catchup. Citing a draft document released this week, the Financial Times reported today the EU would reconsider an earlier idea to only allow Big Tech data center operators offset the emissions of their baseload power suppliers by buying certificates from wind and solar operators, but only of facilities built over the last ten years and close to the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sumitomo-backed Phoenix Tailings taps Asia to strengthen US rare-earth ambitions
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rivian raises 2026 delivery outlook while Lucid misses Wall Street expectations for second quarter
top_signals.summary: Rivian is increasing its delivery outlook to between 65,000 and 70,000 EVs, up from 62,000 to 67,000 units.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Blue Owl hit by $4.7bn of redemption requests as investor exodus persists
top_signals.summary: Withdrawal requests at 20 private credit funds tracked by FT totalled more than $22bn in second quarter
